string baseNeg2(int n) {
    if (n == 0) return "0";
    string res;
    while (n != 0) {
        int rem = n % (-2);
        if (rem < 0) {
            rem += 2;

        res.push_back(rem + '0');
        n = (n - rem) / (-2);
    }
    reverse(res.begin(), res.end());
    return res;
}

solution: 
```class Solution {
public:
    string baseNeg2(int n) {
        if (n == 0) return "0";
        string res;
        while (n != 0) {
            int rem = n % (-2);
            if (rem < 0) {
                rem += 2;
            }
            res.push_back(rem + '0');
            n = (n - rem) / (-2);
        }
        reverse(res.begin(), res.end());
        return res;
    }
};
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(log n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The algorithm efficiently converts the integer to base -2 by repeatedly dividing by -2 and adjusting remainders, ensuring optimal performance with logarithmic time and space complexity.
